title: Red-Eyed Tree Frogs
description: Adds Red-Eyed Tree Frogs based on official concept art (resource pack only).
body:
_(Want real Frog variants? Check out [**Frog Concept Variants**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/frog-concept-variants)!)_ Replaces the Warm Frog in some biomes with a **Red-Eyed Tree Frog** variant. This texture is based on Mojang's original frog concept art. OptiFine or Entity Texture Features (ETF) is **required** for this pack to work as intended, but it can be used without. ## Features ### With OptiFine or ETF: - **Red-Eyed Tree Frogs**. Yep. Don't act so surprised. - They can be found in **Mangrove Swamps** or by naming a Warm Frog to "Red-Eyed Tree Frog" (case insensitive) - Frogs in Jungles, Sparse Jungles, and Bamboo Jungles will also appear as Red-Eyed Tree Frogs. ### Without OptiFine or ETF: - All Warm Frogs will be Red-Eyed Tree Frogs.
## ### MintRefresh:
